anti_claims: This skill JSON seed does not flip source authority away from the current skill markdown projection.
Resolved operated-standard and acted-on-kind edges are structural route mappings, not proof the skill is complete or used correctly by agents.
Absent mechanism or concept neighbours are residual pressure, not evidence that no such neighbours exist.
Generated graph, health, and atlas projections cannot be read back as source evidence.

omitted: mechanism or concept neighbours not named by typed source mapping
omission_receipt.reason: Skill instance preserves public-safe markdown source identity, digest, and typed route mapping only. JSON parity does not prove full skill-body completeness or runtime correctness.

residual_pressure.reentry_condition: Bind skill.uses mechanism and skill.applies concept edges only when source evidence names ids.

justification.summary: The standard declares this exact refine-standard-and-propagate skill id, and the resolved mechanism/source bundle supplies the bounded evidence for Batch 8 policy engines contract propagation.

Skill source mapping names this concept as an applied doctrine boundary.
Skill source mapping names this mechanism as an operational dependency.

skill_payload.mapping_basis: The standard declares this exact refine-standard-and-propagate skill id, and the resolved mechanism/source bundle supplies the bounded evidence for Batch 8 policy engines contract propagation.

statement: Microcosm Batch8 Policy Engines Capsule Refine Standard And Propagate
title: Microcosm Batch8 Policy Engines Capsule Refine Standard And Propagate
triggers: The Batch 8 policy engines standard needs a contract refinement or projection propagation after witness, receipt, negative-case, or authority-boundary changes.
The propagation can be routed through governed standard JSON, skill corpus parity, and doctrine-lattice projections.
workflow: Read the standard, paper-module capsule, mechanism source, runtime code locus, source-module evidence, receipts, relation registry, and generated health before changing the contract.
Refine only standard fields, triad wiring, validation expectations, residual pressure, and projection routes backed by source evidence.
Regenerate the skill corpus and lattice projection while preserving the boundary that bounded policy-engine exercises do not prove live campaign execution, market truth, or release readiness.
